evidence_summary: Establish the physical toll of the marshland terrain and execute a visual transition from open, muddy bogs into the claustrophobic, massive scale of an ancient forest.
Dorothy, Toto, and their companions struggle through disagreeable bogs and marshes before entering a vast, ancient forest characterized by massive trees and thick moss.
From physical exhaustion/discomfort to a sense of awe and foreboding.
Group wading through open, disagreeable marshland.
Group standing beneath a dense, dark forest canopy.
The group navigates difficult bog terrain to reach the forest edge.
